**Bug Report**  
Bug ID:  
**ID \#:** 001

**Name:** Carla Cipolloni

**Reporter:** Carla Cipolloni

**Submit Date:** 11/13/25

Overview:  
**Summary:** When searching for books related to "C++", results shown are books by authors with the middle initial C. No books related to "C++" are shown.

**URL:** https://bookshop.org/beta-search?keywords=c%2B%2B

**Screenshot:** ![][image1]

Environment:  
**Platform:** Windows 

**Operating System:** Windows 11 x 10.0.26200 

**Browser:** LibreWolf 139.0.1-1 

Bug Tracking:  
**Severity:** Minor

**Assigned to:** Carla Cipolloni

**Priority:** Low

---

Description: When searching for books related to "C++", results shown are books by authors with the middle initial C. No books related to "C++" are shown. 

Steps to reproduce: 1\. Type "c++" into search bar on bookshop.org homepage  
2\. View results (see screenshot) 

Expected result: Books related to "c++" should be displayed 

Actual result: Books by authors with the middle initial "C" are displayed 

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
